name: Eqt Holdings Limited
analysis: EQT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 43% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$18.7700, stop A$14.9490, target A$21.2200 (0.64:1) — then trail it.
